chat.app_subtitle: College of Computing, Khon Kaen University
chat.welcome: Hello! You can ask about CP KKU admissions here.
chat.guest_warning: Guest Mode - Chat history is not saved persistently.
chat.delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this chat history? This action cannot be undone.
chat.error_connection: Sorry, a connection error occurred. Please try again.
chat.error_delete: Failed to delete session. Please try again.
chat.sync_success: Knowledge base has been successfully synchronized!
chat.sync_error: An error occurred while syncing knowledge. Please try again.

suggestions.documents: What documents are required for application?
